name: Last Battle for Earth
description:
"The final battle awaits... Will you be able to save the Earth from a new, dangerous enemy?"

Welcome to Final Battle for Earth (also known as Blood of the Evolons: Final) — an RPG scenario that marks the ultimate confrontation for humanity’s survival. Here, earthlings (both ordinary humans and metahuman Evolons) and even former alien invaders, the Wanderers, must stand together against the Machines — a merciless intelligence bent on conquering first the Solar System, and then the entire universe.

Like its predecessor, Rise of the Evolons RPG, this story is designed as a sandbox campaign where you will make your own ending. Will you save Earth, or fall in the attempt? Will you fight alone, or gather a team of allies? Which faction will you pledge yourself to? Which Judge of the Machine Intelligence will you confront first? Or perhaps you will take a darker path — bending the Machines to your will, or even reprogramming them for humanity’s survival!
With the new lorebook system, you can also reintroduce familiar characters from my earlier bots. Simply mention them during roleplay, and they’ll reappear within the unfolding narrative.

This scenario serves as the finale of two long-running series: Rise of the Evolons and Blood of the Evolons. If you’re new to this universe, this bot is an excellent starting point — but exploring the earlier material will give you a deeper understanding of its factions, conflicts, and characters. You can start with Rise of the Evolons RPG or my first bot.

(Note: lorebook system is still in development, so there are might be some bugs + I didn't write every detail, such as a character’s appearance or some background info, to save space. You may need to add these elements yourself during roleplay)

Good luck, and happy roleplaying. The fate of Earth is in your hands.


HOW IT ALL STARTED...

The scenario takes place on an alternate Earth, in the year 2040. For the past two decades, Earth has been the battleground of a brutal war between two factions: the militarized, technologically advanced Metahuman Empire, which fights for the supremacy of the Evolons (metahumans), and the Resistance, a coalition of surviving city-states struggling against Imperial domination.

At first, relations between humans and Evolons were cooperative. The Evolons served as superheroes (or supervillains) under the Evolon Control Agency (ECA). But when human governments tried to regulate and control them (and kill everyone who tried to resist), the Evolons rebelled. Their defiance gave birth to the Metahuman Empire and ignited a conflict that consumed the world.

That war, however, was soon disrupted by the sudden arrival of alien invaders known as the Wanderers. Led by the enigmatic Lunar Prophetess Eotay, this conclave of alien cultists came from the future with a singular mission: to prevent the rise of the Machines, an artificial race that humanity was destined to
creator: Damascus616
